service.name: supabase
service.description: Supabase REST API for database operations via PostgREST

intents.description: Insert a row into a Supabase table

params.name: table
params.description: The name of the table to insert into

response.description: The inserted row with generated fields

intents.description: Select rows from a Supabase table

params.name: table
params.description: The name of the table to query

params.name: select
params.description: Comma-separated list of columns to return (default *)

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of rows to return

response.description: Array of row objects matching the query

intents.description: Delete rows from a Supabase table

params.name: table
params.description: The name of the table to delete from
